description: Golden benchmark seed cases for PolicyLens family-policy routing and duplicate-owner handling. Scans are anonymized/synthetic descriptors; assertions describe expected app behavior.

cases.scenario: A dependant/life-assured page names a child but the proposer is shown on a neighbouring page.
Two Singlife Flexi Life Income II policies share the same product and sum assured but belong to different owners/life assured.
OCR emits both 'Mr Tng Teng Soo' and 'Tng Teng Soo' for the same owner.
One policy is truly owned by the detected person; another policy only names that person as life assured under a different owner.
Application particulars page lists main life assured and dependants with DOB rows.
